verification_evidence.evidence: python -c ast.parse OK — pipeline.py 구문 오류 없음
shutil.which 모킹 → status=BLOCKED, failure_code=pr_approver_fetch_failed 확인됨 (TestProvenance::test_gates_accept_provenance_gh_missing PASS)

ac.description: gh CLI 미설치 시 pr_approver_fetch_failed BLOCKED 반환
ac.verification: TestProvenance::test_gates_accept_provenance_gh_missing PASS — shutil.which 모킹 None 반환 시 BLOCKED, failure_code=pr_approver_fetch_failed

ac.description: PIPELINE_ALLOWED_APPROVER env 재정의, 기본값 hojiyong2-commits, exact match
ac.verification: PIPELINE_ALLOWED_APPROVER = os.environ.get("PIPELINE_ALLOWED_APPROVER", "hojiyong2-commits") 확인됨, body.strip() == accept_code exact match 적용
TestProvenance 4개 케이스 모두 PASS — PIPELINE_STATE_PATH 격리, final_state assertion, subprocess 기반
